seaCreatures.chat_trigger: The Rider of the Deep has emerged.

seaCreatures.name: Catfish
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Huh? A Catfish!

seaCreatures.name: Sea Leech
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Gross! A Sea Leech!

seaCreatures.name: Guardian Defender
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You've discovered a Guardian Defender of the sea.

seaCreatures.name: Deep Sea Protector
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You have awoken the Deep Sea Protector, prepare for a battle!

seaCreatures.name: Water Hydra
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: The Water Hydra has come to test your Strength.

seaCreatures.name: Frosty
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Its a Snowman! It looks harmless

seaCreatures.name: Nutcracker
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You found a forgotten Nutcracker laying beneath the ice

seaCreatures.name: Frozen Steve
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Frozen Steve fell into the pond long ago

seaCreatures.name: Grinch
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: The Grinch stole Jerry's Gifts

seaCreatures.name: Yeti
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: What is this creature!?

seaCreatures.name: Reindrake
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A Reindrake forms from the depths.

seaCreatures.name: Magma Slug
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: From beneath the lava appears a Magma Slug

seaCreatures.name: Moogma
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You hear a faint Moo from the lava

seaCreatures.name: Lava Leech
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A small but fearsome Lava Leech emerges.

seaCreatures.name: Pyroclastic Worm
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You feel the heat radiating as a Pyroclastic Worm surfaces.

seaCreatures.name: Lava Flame
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A Lava Flame flies out from beneath the lava.

seaCreatures.name: Fire Eel
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A Fire Eel slithers out from the depths

seaCreatures.name: Taurus
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Taurus and his steed emerge.

seaCreatures.name: Thunder
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You hear a massive rumble as Thunder emerges.

seaCreatures.name: Lord Jawbus
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You have angered a legendary creature

seaCreatures.name: Nurse Shark
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A tiny fin emerges from the water

seaCreatures.name: Blue Shark
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You spot a fin as blue as the water it came from

seaCreatures.name: Tiger Shark
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A striped beast bounds from the depths

seaCreatures.name: Great White Shark
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Hide no longer, a Great White Shark has tracked your scent and thirsts for your blood!

seaCreatures.name: Bogged
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You've hooked a Bogged!

seaCreatures.name: Wetwing
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Look! A Wetwing emerges!

seaCreatures.name: Tadgang
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A gang of Liltads!

seaCreatures.name: Ent
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You've hooked an Ent, as ancient as the forest itself.

seaCreatures.name: The Loch Emperor
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: The Loch Emperor arises from the depths.

seaCreatures.name: Nessie
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: You've caused a disturbance in the loch. Could it be... Nessie?

seaCreatures.name: Frog Man
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: Is it a frog? Is it a man? Well, yes, sorta, IT'S FROG MAN!!!!!!

seaCreatures.name: Snapping Turtle
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A Snapping Turtle is coming your way, and it's ANGRY!

seaCreatures.name: Blue Ringed Octopus
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: A garish set of tentacles arise. It's a Blue Ringed Octopus!

seaCreatures.name: Wiki Tiki
seaCreatures.chat_trigger: The water bubbles and froths. A massive form emerges- you have disturbed the Wiki Tiki! You shall pay the price.
